tree.name: Johni Broome
tree.tradeDescription: Drafted #35 overall by Philadelphia from Auburn. Selected with the 2025 2nd round pick acquired from Dallas in the Caleb Martin/Quentin Grimes trade (Feb 4, 2025).

assetsGivenUp.name: Caleb Martin
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: PHI traded Caleb Martin to DAL for Quentin Grimes and this 2025 2nd round pick (#35, became Johni Broome). Dallas also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent from Miami Heat. Sent to Dallas Feb 4, 2025.
